reason: Frontend layer entry — covers new useWorkspaceMode hook, LeftSidebar floating-repo rendering, AppImpl handler adjustments, and startup effect changes.
workspaceMode is derived state; activeProjectId must be cleared when a floating repo is selected. App-shell vs hook ownership applies to where workspaceMode lives.
useWorkspaceMode is a new derived-state hook returning 'single_repo' | 'multi_repo'; follow naming, memoization, and pure-derivation conventions (no Tauri side effects in derived hooks).

WorkspaceMode is a discriminated string-union; consumers must exhaustively narrow. Floating-repo list and ProjectItem.repositoryIds zero-case must remain type-safe (no nullish coalesce hiding misses).
LeftSidebar gains a new top-level floating-repo group and an 'add floating repo' entry; components must not call invoke directly — route through services/repository and services/projectState.
§3 employee-UI hide-rule extends to floating repos (single_repo defaults to wise_trellis sddMode). Verify no regression of shouldHideEmployeeUi semantics.
New hook goes under src/hooks/, derived selectors under src/utils/ if pure; do not introduce src/pages/ — routing is not enabled.

If list_floating_repositories is added, follow command naming / params casing / error-code conventions; prefer composing list_repositories + project_repositories filter when possible to avoid net-new backend state.
DB schema is unchanged in this task — confirm M:N project_repositories already supports 0-association (migration 003) and no new migration is required.
Single direction: AppImpl/useWorkspaceMode -> services/projectState + services/repository -> invoke. No component reads invoke directly; no service reads React state.

Promotion (floating -> project) reuses createProject + addRepositoryToProject from services/projectState. Do not invent a combined 'promote_repo' IPC. Existing resolveProjectMainSessionAnchor must not be duplicated for floating repos.
